name: B2B SaaS
engine_context: Requires multi-tenant database partitioning and Stripe Billing subscription logic.

name: Micro-SaaS
engine_context: Requires single-database setup and quick Stripe checkout integration.

name: Usage-Based SaaS
engine_context: Requires real-time event ingestion pipeline and meter-based Stripe billing.

name: Open-Core
engine_context: Requires separate open-source codebase and premium feature authentication gates.

name: API-as-a-Service
engine_context: Requires API key management, rate-limiting middleware, and Stripe metered billing.

name: AI Wrapper
engine_context: Requires OpenAI/Gemini API integration, usage tracking, and streaming responses.

name: Two-Sided B2C Marketplace
engine_context: Requires Stripe Connect for split routing and automated seller onboarding.

name: B2B Managed Marketplace
engine_context: Requires Stripe Connect, escrow capabilities, and manual admin verification flows.

name: Reverse Auction
engine_context: Requires real-time WebSockets for bidding, stripe authorization holds, and bid matching engine.

name: Directory
engine_context: Requires PostgreSQL search indexes, structured metadata schemas, and submission payment collection.

name: Pay-Per-Lead
engine_context: Requires lead distribution router, validation API, and stripe balance charging.

name: Data Arbitrage
engine_context: Requires scheduled web scraping cron jobs, data cleaning pipelines, and API query billing.

name: pSEO Empire
engine_context: Requires dynamic routing with ISR, localized sitemap generation, and schema.org structured data.

name: Productized Service
engine_context: Requires client portal workspace, Stripe subscription billing, and intake questionnaire flows.

name: Drop-Servicing
engine_context: Requires stripe payment integration, automated vendor referral API, and client messaging board.

name: Robotics-as-a-Service
engine_context: Requires IoT device telemetry ingestion, remote control API gates, and lease billing cycles.

name: B2G
engine_context: Requires strict SAML SSO authentication, FEDRAMP-compliant encrypted database, and audit log tracking.

name: Paid Newsletter
engine_context: Requires integration with Resend/Loop, Stripe subscription gates, and markdown content compilers.

name: Token-Gated Community
engine_context: Requires Web3 wallet authentication, ERC-20/721 contract verification, and Discord webhook sync.

name: Hub & Spoke Ecosystem
engine_context: Requires central database API distribution, cross-domain CORS credentials, and unified authentication.

name: Info-Product
engine_context: Requires secure file download storage, Stripe single-checkout, and email product delivery via Resend.

name: D2C
engine_context: Requires Shopify storefront API integration, Stripe payment gateway, and shipping fulfillment webhooks.

name: Dropshipping
engine_context: Requires AliExpress/Spocket API syncing, order automated placement, and stripe payment processing.

name: Print-on-Demand
engine_context: Requires Printful/Printify API webhooks, dynamic image rendering, and Stripe checkout.

name: Subscription Box
engine_context: Requires monthly recurring billing logic, shipping address verification, and inventory count webhooks.

name: White-Labeling
engine_context: Requires dynamic custom domain routing, white-label client admin console, and tenant-branded emails.

name: Affiliate Marketing
engine_context: Requires click attribution tracking, referral cookie management, and automated payout ledger.

name: Ad-Supported Platform
engine_context: Requires Google AdSense/Doubleclick script injection, ad impression analytics database, and content walls.

name: Hardware-as-a-Service
engine_context: Requires device activation API, asset tracking inventory database, and recurring device lease billing.

name: Open-Source Sponsor-Backed
engine_context: Requires GitHub Sponsors webhook integration, sponsor-only feature gates, and public ledger database.
